rationale: In the citing paper, Cheema and Kaikati (2010) appears as one item in a grouped parenthetical citation used to justify the outcome measure (number of reported WOM conversations) in the BzzAgent data. The citing authors do not build hypotheses from that paper's need-for-uniqueness theory, nor do they use it for interpretation of their main results. The reference functions as brief methodological/background support rather than a distinct intellectual basis for this article's contribution.
